text: Awarded the DAC Young Fellows fellowship. Attended [DAC](https://archive.dac.com/about/conference-archive/62nd-dac-2025.html) 2025 as a Young Fellow and presented my research.

Started PhD in Computer Science at [UTSA](https://www.utsa.edu/), advised by [Dr. Mimi Xie](https://sites.google.com/view/mxie). Joined the [ASIC Lab](https://caicc.utsa.edu/computer-science/research/facilities.html).

Graduated from [PSU](https://www.psu.edu/) with a MS in Computer Science, with master's project titled "Vehicle Lane-Changing Prediction: An LSTM-HMM hybrid approach", advised by [Dr. Truong Tran](https://harrisburg.psu.edu/faculty-and-staff/truong-tran-phd).
Started my MS in Computer Science at [PSU](https://www.psu.edu/).
Employed as a Software Engineer at [GoGoX](https://www.gogox.com/index/).

Graduated from [HKU](https://www.hku.hk/) with a BEng in Computer Science, with final year project titled "AI Skincare Advisor", advised by [Dr. Lam Ka Man Carmen](https://cs.hku.hk/people/academic-staff/kmlam).
Employed as Software Engineer Intern at [Set Sail Software](https://chatbot.com.hk/).
Started my exchange semester at [UBC](https://www.ubc.ca/). Awarded HKU Worldwide Student Exchange Scholarship.
Awarded the [HKU Foundation](https://giving.hku.hk/about) Entrance Scholarship for full tuition.
Started my BEng in Computer Science at [HKU](https://www.hku.hk/).
Graduated from [KGS](https://kgs.edu.pk/), completing CIE GCE A-Level examinations.
Represented Pakistan at [IChO](https://www.icho2016.chemistry.ge/) 2016 held at Tbilisi, Georgia.
